prestazioni: Forced induction upgrade via HKS GT-SS turbocharger kit (model GT-SS42) paired with a custom 3.5L 2GR-FKS engine build, featuring forged internals (JE 9.5:1 pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft) to handle 18 psi of boost, targeting 550 whp on E85 fuel with a Tomei 272° camshaft upgrade and a custom Haltech Elite 2500 ECU tune

Full bolt-on suspension overhaul with Tein Flex Z coilovers (Harrier-specific valving) and Cusco front/rear strut bars, paired with Whiteline adjustable rear sway bars (24mm) and poly bushings to eliminate body roll during high-speed cornering on JDM touge roads

High-flow fuel system upgrade including a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, ID1000cc injectors, and a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator, combined with a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system featuring a Tomei 4-2-1 header and a Fujitsubo Authorize R muffler for optimized scavenging
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS Harrier-specific widebody kit (front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, paired with a Varis Arising II front lip and rear diffuser for aggressive stance and aero balance

Custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap with JDM-spec blacked-out emblems (Toyota badge, Harrier script, and hybrid badges) and a full de-chrome treatment, including gloss black window trim and mirror caps

OEM+ interior refresh with Bride Gias II bucket seats (Harrier-specific mounting brackets), a Nardi Classic steering wheel (380mm, suede), and a custom rear seat delete with a carbon fiber storage panel, finished with a full LED interior lighting kit from Diode Dynamics
